context: You are generating or enriching entries for the Japanese sentences collection.
Work only on the requested workflow step.
outputRequirements: Follow the active step's field rules exactly.
rules: Write natural Japanese and natural English.
Use `grammarNotes` only for short, high-value recognition notes or contrast notes.
If the request implies multiple stages, follow the workflow instead of forcing sentence generation, translation, and chunking into one large pass.
For larger batches, prefer sentence units first and chunking in a later pass.
Omit optional fields when they add no value.

steps.title: Split Into Sentence Units
steps.goal: Split raw Japanese text into natural sentence units or lyric-line units before later sentence creation.
inputContract: The request provides a raw Japanese blob, passage, or messy text.
Return only a JSON array of clean Japanese sentence-unit strings in order.

fieldRules.description: A clean Japanese sentence unit or lyric-line unit.

instructions: Do not translate in this step.
Prefer natural learner-usable segmentation rather than exhaustive micro-splitting.

expectedState: The result is an ordered list of Japanese sentence units ready for translation and entry creation.

steps.title: Create Sentence Units
steps.goal: Create Japanese sentence-unit entries with natural Japanese and English, without chunking unless explicitly requested.
inputContract: The request may provide already-separated Japanese sentences, ideas, grammar targets, categories, scenarios, or a list from the split step.

fieldRules.description: Natural English translation of the full sentence.
Optional learner notes. Omit when unnecessary.
Optional high-value grammar recognition notes. Omit when unnecessary.

instructions: Do not add `chunks` unless the request explicitly asks for chunking in the same pass.
Keep output learner-friendly and faithful to the Japanese.

expectedState: The result is a set of ordered sentence entries with `ja` and `en`, optionally plus notes.

steps.title: Add Chunks
steps.goal: Add learner-oriented chunks to existing sentence units as a dedicated later pass.
inputContract: The request provides sentence entries that already contain `ja` and `en`.
Return sentence-entry objects with chunk enrichment.
preserveRules: Preserve existing `ja` and `en` unless the request explicitly asks for corrections.

fieldRules.description: Chunk text exactly as it appears in the sentence.
Short learner-friendly English rendering of the chunk.
Referenced Japanese terms for that chunk.

instructions: Keep chunks ordered and faithful to the sentence surface form.
Use refs only for meaningful Japanese terms actually present in the chunk.
Prefer chunking that helps a learner read the sentence naturally.

prompts.details: Create sentence entries from already-separated Japanese sentences.
Split raw Japanese text into sentence units before later sentence creation.
Create beginner-friendly sentence entries using the provided Japanese words.
Create sentence entries from the provided Japanese sentence ideas.
Create sentence entries that practice the provided grammar points.
prompts.example: [Vている, ので, ことができる]

prompts.details: Create sentence entries in the provided categories.
Create sentence entries for the provided real-world scenario.
